s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC (1) located around bottom of instrument panel on driver’s seat side.
Light sunload sensor with an incandescent light of approximately 100 W placed directly above it at distance of about 100 mm (3.94 in.).

attention3.ptxt: DTC B1504 is detected even though there is not any malfunction if sunload sensor is not lit by an incandescent light. Be sure to light the sunload sensor with a light.

s1.ptxt: Read DTC displayed on SUZUKI scan tool.

attention3.ptxt: To know how to use SUZUKI scan tool, refer to operator’s manual for SUZUKI scan tool.

s1.ptxt: After completing the check, set ignition to “OFF” and disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC.
